zh-CN.name: 柠檬
zh-CN.intro: 柠檬是一种椭圆形的水果，颜色黄黄的，味道酸酸的。它含有丰富的维生素，可以帮助小朋友增强抵抗力。

story.title: 🐻小熊的柠檬水
story.body: 夏天到了，天气好热好热。小熊贝贝在果园里发现了一棵柠檬树，上面挂着好多黄澄澄的柠檬。贝贝摘下一个柠檬，闻了闻，哇，好清新的香味！它把柠檬带回家，切成薄片，放进水壶里，再加入一点点蜂蜜。然后，贝贝叫来小伙伴们：小兔子、小猴子和小鸟。大家一人一杯，喝了一口柠檬水。“酸酸甜甜的，真好喝！”大家开心地说。贝贝看到朋友们都喜欢，心里甜丝丝的。原来，用酸酸的柠檬也可以做出让大家都快乐的美味饮料呀！

knowledge.title: 柠檬为什么那么酸？
knowledge.body: 柠檬的酸味来自它含有的柠檬酸。柠檬酸是一种天然的果酸，不仅让柠檬味道酸爽，还能帮助食物保鲜，所以柠檬常被用来做调味和饮品。

en.name: Lemon
en.intro: A lemon is an oval, yellow fruit that tastes sour. It is rich in vitamins that help strengthen the immune system.

story.title: 🐻Little Bear's Lemonade
story.body: Summer arrived, and the weather was very hot. Little Bear Beibei found a lemon tree in the orchard, with many bright yellow lemons hanging on it. Beibei picked a lemon and smelled it—what a fresh fragrance! He took the lemon home, sliced it thinly, put the slices into a water jug, and added a little honey. Then, Beibei called his friends: Little Rabbit, Little Monkey, and Little Bird. Everyone had a cup and sipped the lemonade. 'Sour and sweet, it's so delicious!' they said happily. Beibei felt warm inside seeing his friends enjoy it. It turns out that even a sour lemon can be made into a delightful drink that makes everyone happy!

knowledge.title: Why are lemons so sour?
knowledge.body: The sour taste of lemons comes from citric acid, a natural fruit acid. Citric acid gives lemons their zesty flavor and also helps preserve food, which is why lemons are often used in cooking and drinks.
